character.name: Kiếm sĩ (nữ)
character.prompt:
FEMALE KNIGHT — GREATSWORD & SHIELD VERSION

masterpiece, ultra detailed anime female knight, fantasy armored swordswoman, ONLY ONE GIANT GREATSWORD AND ONE SHIELD, no second sword, no dual wield, no extra weapon, no dagger, no spear, no bow, no floating weapon, no weapon on waist, no weapon on back

full body female knight character, long blonde hair, glowing amber eyes, mature anime face, confident expression, athletic body, elegant fantasy warrior

wearing royal blue and silver heavy knight armor, detailed breastplate, giant pauldrons, armored gauntlets, armored boots, layered metal armor, blue crystal decorations, royal blue cape flowing behind

RIGHT HAND holding one massive fantasy greatsword, giant silver blade with glowing blue crystal core, golden cross guard, holy knight aesthetic, sword almost as tall as the character

LEFT HAND holding a large royal knight shield, detailed silver and gold shield, blue glowing crystal in center, holy emblem engraved on shield, heavy fantasy defense shield, elegant but powerful design

standing battle-ready pose, shield positioned on left side, giant sword positioned on right side, strong knight stance, balanced composition

premium Korean MMORPG art style, Blue Protocol style, Granblue Fantasy style, Lost Ark style, AAA anime game character design, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed armor textures, sharp anime eyes, clean lineart

simple white or soft gradient background, character focus only, no environment, no buildings, no extra objects, no UI, no logo, no text

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
multiple swords, extra sword, dual swords, floating weapons, dagger, spear, axe, gun, cropped weapon, extra arms, blurry, low quality, chibi, sci-fi armor, background clutter
